title: Wolf Variants Backport
body:
# About 
**Have you ever wanted the new wolf variants in older versions of Minecraft?** Well, now you can have them all! With this resource pack and its extensions, you can have any wolf you want with no restrictions!

If you're wondering, yes, this is compatible with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)!
# OptiFine/ETF Required!
The base resource pack will NOT work without [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) (or [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) if you use Fabric).

# Related Content
[Individual Wolf Variants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lp-extensions) is an extra set of resource packs for users who want to choose ONE wolf variant to play the game with.
> - These do not require OptiFine/ETF
> - Individual wolf variants cannot be used with the base pack
> - More extensions will be added over time if an idea arises

[Bigger Wolf Collars](https://modrinth.com/project/beagle-bangles) is a resource pack that expands the wolf collar to resemble the one from 1.20.5!
> - Does not require OptiFine/ETF
> - Compatible with this resource pack and its extensions
